Escape
Our expert cleaning staff will help your
home become a clean and quiet get away
from the work week and the world. How it Works Be Present Spend more time doing things
you love together. Let us do
the cleaning while you enjoy
the moments. How it Works Kick Back Hiring a professional house cleaning service
leaves you more hours in the day for you time. How it Works Love your space A good professional house cleaning can make
your house feel fresh and new all over again. How it Works

Maid in Heaven provides house cleaning and commercial office cleaning services for Fredericksburg, Spotsylvanis, Stafford, King George, and the surrounding areas. What sets Maid in Heaven apart is our professional cleaning team and our attention to the small cleaning details within your house that matter to you! We guarantee quality results and stand behind our work 100%.

Maid in Heaven has been cleaning houses, apartments, townhouses, and offices since 2008. All of our team members are home cleaning care experts. They are properly vetted and screened prior to employment which means you can trust our team do its job right. We offer a full line of house cleaning services to make sure we meet your expectations.

Maid in Heaven offers weekly, biweekly, monthly, or one-time house cleaning plans. Our services are designed for you and by you and are set according to your budget.

We also provide move in/move out cleaning. This deep cleaning service, much like our spring cleaning package, helps realtors and property managers prepare the houses, apartments, and townhouses they’re actively listing for the next renter.

Let us put your mind at ease. Get a free estimate or call with any questions you may have. We’re here to serve you.

Call 540-907-1712

We Clean So You Can Focus on What Matters to You

Our house cleaning staff provides thorough room by room cleaning to tackle the things that take up your valuable time. Our mission is to provide all customers with the best quality of cleaning services for home and commercial requests.

Get to Know Us

At Maid in Heaven, it is our mission to develop strong relationships with our clients by cleaning their homes and offices thoroughly, efficiently, and consistently. We strive to seek out the very best people to provide the very best cleaning services and treat our clients like family.

We Provide Impeccable House Cleaning Services!

At Maid in Heaven, we always arrive on-time, ready to go, and excited to provide you with the best house or office cleaning service imaginable. Here's a sample of what we offer:
